title: Recover Python IPv6 and routing bounds
description: Recover ICMPv6/UDP ingress validation, LOADng wrap-aware freshness and bounds, GPSR coordinate safety, and RPL DAO/DODAG/source-route validation.
acceptance_criteria: Malformed sources/checksums/routes drop; sequence wrap vectors agree; invalid/stale coordinates never route; RPL vectors cover E flag and lollipop boundaries; focused tests and three reviews pass.
